These embeddings are then navigated through a previously constructed memory index to retrieve the top-k related images based on similarity. The retrieved category labels along with the image embedding are integrated and sent to the MLLMs (Multi-Label Learning Models) through a ranking prompt. The MLLMs combine the internal knowledge and the retrieved information to make the final prediction of the image category. This process ensures a more accurate and contextually aware classification prediction, enhancing the performance in few-shot and zero-shot perception tasks.
